title: elatostema lineolatum var. lineare
intro: Elatostema lineolatum var. lineare, also known as the 'Creeping Crested Elm' or 'Lineolate Elatostema', is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Elatostema lineolatum var. lineare can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal extracts, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparation methods.
